introSection: Bobsleigh is a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf currently located at Parc de la Vallée in Massais, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.
fullText:
Bobsleigh is a steel roller coaster built by German manufacturer Schwarzkopf currently located at Parc de la Vallée in Massais, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.



Light blue track and supports.
